hero.intro: Every business signal — IoT, invisible integrations, a WhatsApp bot — collapsed into a single interface. Thin, replaceable layers that minimize the product surface and keep operational entropy under control.
hero.atmosphereCaption: One surface orchestrates the sensors, integrations, and chat — every signal collapsed into a single command layer.
hero.atmosphereAlt: Conceptual render: a walnut command surface with a 22°C ambient thermostat, a holographic 'invisible operations' pipeline, and Tero Bot in WhatsApp.

problem.title: The trap of packaged software.
problem.p1: Hiring a generic SaaS to manage your rentals is like renting a five-story building for a team of three. You pay through the nose for tools you don't need, while your day-to-day is still full of manual tasks.
problem.p2: That's why I built tero.bot. Instead of fighting rigid third-party systems, I built a modular architecture. It's a ‘Pod-of-One’ model: I operate solo but leveraged by AI and automations. Only the modules that solve real problems. No junk.

modules.subtitle: Thin, composable, replaceable layers — each solves a real operational problem.

hospitality.title: Automatic hospitality
hospitality.challenge: The guest experience doesn't start with the keys — it starts with thermal comfort the moment they walk in.
hospitality.module: Integrated temperature and humidity control. Pre-conditioning 2 hours before check-in.
hospitality.philosophy: Most times, the best UX isn't on a screen — it's the perfect climate when someone walks in.
hospitality.alt: Conceptual render: a Zigbee ambient thermostat glowing 22°C on walnut wood, beside a holographic 'Check-in Preparation' graph showing the room ramping from 19.5°C to 22.0°C by 16:00 (T-minus 2h).

operations.title: Invisible operations
operations.challenge: Tracking energy costs by hand and matching them against real occupancy is an administrative time sink.
operations.module: A backend flow that intercepts utility bills via email, parses the data, and matches them automatically against real consumption.
operations.philosophy: The bureaucratic tasks are solved by the backend. Fewer manual interfaces, more invisible integrations.
operations.alt: Conceptual render: a walnut surface with a holographic 'Invisible Operations / Energy Reconciliation Pipeline' panel — chaotic email and PDF invoices flow through an amber prism into a structured cost table on the right (TYPE, DATE, BILL_AMOUNT, OCCUPANCY_MATCH, VARIANCE, STATUS — all RECONCILED).

frictionless.title: Zero-friction UI
frictionless.challenge: Forcing staff to download another app and learn a new system creates resistance and errors.
frictionless.module: Incident reports, task assignment, tracking, and notifications — all via WhatsApp.
frictionless.philosophy: The best tool is the one we all use. Instead of forcing people into a new system, I brought the system to them.
frictionless.alt: Conceptual render: an iPhone on walnut wood shows a WhatsApp chat with Tero Bot ('Set heat to 22C in Cabin 4 for 18:00 check-in'); beside it, a holographic technical log shows the message being received, processed, and queued as an IoT task.

source.p1: I believe in context engineering and learning in public. tero.bot is the real operational engine of my complex — the code is open to share the system design and accelerate collective learning.
source.p2: It is not a community-maintained open-source project. Feel free to explore the code, fork it, and use the concepts to build your own systems.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access the panel with your phone.

errors.notFound: No user found with that phone.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Live temperature and humidity per room. Hourly capture from Tuya. Tap a card to see the history.

empty.intro: No T/H sensors assigned to any property yet. To get started:
empty.step1Post: and assign the Tuya devices by tagging them as “T/H Sensor”.
empty.step2: Click “Sync rooms” to create rooms from Smart Life.
empty.step3: Click “Capture sensors” to force the first reading.

rooms.noRecentBody: The sensor did not respond in {range}. Check connection / battery in Smart Life or trigger a capture.

roomDetail.subtitle: {property} · {sensorsLabel} · {readingsLabel} in {range}
roomDetail.noSensorsPre: This room has no sensors assigned. Assign a device in
roomDetail.noReadingsPre: No readings in the last {range}. Trigger a capture with the “Capture sensors” button in
roomDetail.partialBody: We only have data since {date}. The sensor wasn't capturing before that date (hourly snapshot enabled recently).
roomDetail.tempTooltip: Min/max computed with p5/p95 percentiles to filter outliers (cold sensor on boot, erratic readings). For series <20 samples falls back to raw min/max.
roomDetail.humTooltip: Min/max computed with p5/p95 percentiles to filter outliers.

energyPage.title: Energy
energyPage.subtitlePre: Live consumption per property. History via hourly snapshots. Tariff and currency are configured per property in
energyPage.noDevicesP1: No devices identifiable as energy meters were found among the {n} devices in the cloud project.

backfillButton.confirm: This will request ~30 days of historical logs from Tuya and create the corresponding snapshots. Continue?
backfillButton.okToast: Backfill OK · {inserted} inserted, {duplicates} duplicates, {errors} with errors across {devices} devices.
backfillButton.errorHint: There are errors — check browser console for details.

deviceCard.offline: 🔌 Device offline — no live reading. Historical data still below.
deviceCard.noLive: Tuya didn't return live power/energy data.
deviceCard.partialBody: We only have data since {date}. The hourly captures started recently; the {range} range will fill in.

billsPage.title: Bills
billsPage.subtitlePost: or load them manually. For historical backfills, send up to 3–4 PDFs per email (Vercel caps the payload at 4.5 MB).
billsPage.emptyPre: Forward the first email from UTE / OSE / Antel / Edenor / AySA / Personal Flow / Prosegur to
billsPage.emptyPost: and you'll see it here. Meanwhile, you can use «New bill».

help.headerFull:
*{appName} Commands*

📊 *Consumption* (admin/manager)
• _consumo_ — total summary (today + 7 days)
• _consumo <name>_ — filter by property
   Ex: _consumo merced_ or _consumo 14 julio_

🌡️ *Rooms* (admin/manager)
• _ambientes_ — avg T/H over the last 24 h per room

📋 *Tasks*
• _tareas_ — your pending tasks
• _tarea <description>_ — create a new task
   Ex: _tarea the bathroom tap broke_
• 📸 send a *photo* (with or without caption) → auto-creates a task

❓ *Help*
• _ayuda_ — this list
help.headerStaff:
*{appName} Commands*

📋 *Tasks*
• _tareas_ — your pending tasks
• _tarea <description>_ — create a task (assigned to you)
   Ex: _tarea the bathroom tap broke_
• 📸 send a *photo* → auto-creates a task

❓ *Help*
• _ayuda_ — this list

consumption.noMatchFilter: No property matches "{filter}". Try without a filter or with a different name.
consumption.title: *{appName} · Consumption*

rooms.errorReport: ❌ Could not generate the rooms report: {message}
rooms.noVisibleProperties: 📭 You have no properties visible with your user.
rooms.noSensors: 📭 No T/H sensors assigned. Assign them at {host}/admin/tuya
rooms.noRecent: 📭 No room has readings in the last 24h. Force a capture from /admin/tuya.
rooms.title: 🌡️ *Rooms — last 24 h*

auth.myTasksUnlinked:
🔒 Your number (`{phone}`) is not linked to any user.

Ask an admin/manager to add that exact number to your profile ({host} → Users → edit) and try again.
auth.notAuthorized:
🔒 Your number (`{phone}`) is not authorized to use commands.

If you're an admin/manager of {appName}, add that exact number to your profile ({host} → Users → edit) and try again.

whatsapp.staffUnknownCommand: Hi, I'm *{appName}* 🐦. I didn't understand that message. Send `ayuda` to see the available commands.

createTask.needsDescription:
📝 I need a description or a photo to create the task.

Try:
• `tarea <property> the tap broke`
• or send a photo of the issue (caption optional)
createTask.noPropertiesYet: ❌ No properties loaded yet. Ask an admin to create them.
createTask.propertyGone: ❌ That property no longer exists. Try again.
createTask.invalidChoice: That option isn't available. Try a number between 1 and {max}, or *0* to cancel.
createTask.cancelled: 👍 Cancelled. The task was not created.
createTask.unlinkedSender: 🔒 Your number (`{phone}`) is not linked to any user, so I can't create the task. Ask an admin to add the number to your profile.
createTask.assignedTriage: 👤 Unassigned — an admin/manager will route it.
